testcase.name: authenticated_customer_can_materialize_selected_product_inside_account_favorites
testcase.system-out:
• Playwright pages after init: 1 ▶ Authenticated account favorites preconditions ▶ Clear browser session ✅ PASS: Session cleared ✅ PASS: Ready ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/register • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/register • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/register ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Type into element: First name • locator=input[data-test='first-name'] • value=John ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Last name • locator=input[data-test='last-name'] • value=Doe ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Date of Birth • locator=input[data-test='dob'] • value=1990-01-01 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Phone • locator=input[data-test='phone'] • value=0712345678 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Email address • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_dd0btneu5g@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@VYzaM4WI ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Select option: Country • locator=select[data-test='country'] • value=RO ✅ PASS: Selected ▶ Type into element: Postal code • locator=input[data-test='postal_code'] • value=10001 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: House number • locator=input[data-test='house_number'] • value=5 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Street • locator=input[data-test='street'] • value=Main Street 1 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: City • locator=input[data-test='city'] • value=Bucharest ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: State • locator=input[data-test='state'] • value=B ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Register • locator=button[data-test='register-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/login • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/login • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/login ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Type into element: Login email • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_dd0btneu5g@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Login password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@VYzaM4WI ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Login submit • locator=input[data-test='login-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Open URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/account • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/account • Playwright pages after open: 1 ✅ PASS: Opened ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/ • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/ • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: / ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Click visible match on: First storefront product • locator=a[data-test^='product-'] • visibleIndex=1 ✅ PASS: Clicked visible match ▶ Get text from: Current product title • locator=[data-test='product-name'] • text=Combination Pliers ✅ PASS: Text captured ▶ Click on: Add to favourites • locator=[data-test='add-to-favorites'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/account/favorites • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/account/favorites • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /account/favorites ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Get text from: Favorites page body • locator=body • text=View the Documentation for this application. Practice Black Box Testing & Bug Hunting Testing Guide 🐛 Bug Hunting Home Categories Contact EN Favorites There are no favorites yet. In order to add favorites, please go to the product listing and mark some products as your favorite.

Versatile combination pliers designed for gripping, bending, and cutting wire with ease. Featuring chrome vanadium steel construction with induction-hardened cutting edges, these pliers deliver excellent grip and leverage for a wide range of tasks. T...

Versatile combination pliers designed for gripping, bending, and cutting wire with ease. Featuring chrome vanadium steel construction with induction-hardened cutting edges, these pliers deliver excellent grip and leverage for a wide range of tasks. T...

testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.

testcase.name: authenticated_favorites_keep_both_selected_products_after_relogin
testcase.system-out:
• Playwright pages after init: 1 ▶ Authenticated favorites preconditions ▶ Clear browser session ✅ PASS: Session cleared ✅ PASS: Ready ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/register • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/register • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/register ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Type into element: First name • locator=input[data-test='first-name'] • value=John ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Last name • locator=input[data-test='last-name'] • value=Doe ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Date of Birth • locator=input[data-test='dob'] • value=1990-01-01 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Phone • locator=input[data-test='phone'] • value=0712345678 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Email address • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_x4s0tzflb8@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@4oWdijdi ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Select option: Country • locator=select[data-test='country'] • value=RO ✅ PASS: Selected ▶ Type into element: Postal code • locator=input[data-test='postal_code'] • value=10001 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: House number • locator=input[data-test='house_number'] • value=5 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Street • locator=input[data-test='street'] • value=Main Street 1 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: City • locator=input[data-test='city'] • value=Bucharest ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: State • locator=input[data-test='state'] • value=B ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Register • locator=button[data-test='register-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/login • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/login • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/login ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Type into element: Login email • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_x4s0tzflb8@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Login password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@4oWdijdi ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Login submit • locator=input[data-test='login-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Open URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/account • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/account • Playwright pages after open: 1 ✅ PASS: Opened ▶ Resolve live product route for Combination Pliers • route.resolver.status=200 • route.resolver.response ✅ PASS: Resolved Combination Pliers to /product/01KV3MNABBPK3JVEZH3ZRV88GM ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/product/01KV3MNABBPK3JVEZH3ZRV88GM • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/product/01KV3MNABBPK3JVEZH3ZRV88GM • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /product/01KV3MNABBPK3JVEZH3ZRV88GM ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Get text from: Current product title • locator=[data-test='product-name'] • text=Combination Pliers ✅ PASS: Text captured ▶ Click on: Add to favourites • locator=[data-test='add-to-favorites'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Resolve live product route for Hammer • route.resolver.status=200 • route.resolver.response ✅ PASS: Resolved Hammer to /product/01KV3MNABQ2X24Q43T7QFD986Y ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/product/01KV3MNABQ2X24Q43T7QFD986Y • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/product/01KV3MNABQ2X24Q43T7QFD986Y • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /product/01KV3MNABQ2X24Q43T7QFD986Y ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Get text from: Current product title • locator=[data-test='product-name'] • text=Hammer ✅ PASS: Text captured ▶ Click on: Add to favourites • locator=[data-test='add-to-favorites'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Clear browser session ✅ PASS: Session cleared ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/login • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/login • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/login ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Type into element: Login email • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_x4s0tzflb8@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Login password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@4oWdijdi ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click Versatile combination pliers designed for gripping, bending, and cutting wire with ease. Featuring chrome vanadium steel construction with induction-hardened cutting edges, these pliers deliver excellent grip and leverage for a wide range of tasks. T...
Hammer
A dependable standard claw hammer suitable for driving and removing nails in everyday construction, carpentry, and home improvement projects. The 350g carbon steel head is drop-forged and heat-treated for maximum hardness, then fitted to a traditiona...
This is a DEMO application (GitHub repo), used for software testing training purpose. | Privacy Policy | Banner photo by Barn Images on Unsplash. ✅ PASS: Text captured ▶ Get visible texts from: Favorite product names • locator=[data-test='product-name'] • visibleTexts=[Combination Pliers, Hammer] ✅ PASS: Visible texts captured ▶ Get visible texts from: Favorite product names • locator=[data-test='product-name'] • visibleTexts=[Combination Pliers, Hammer] ✅ PASS: Visible texts captured

testcase.name: authenticated_customer_sees_the_empty_favorites_guidance_before_adding_products
testcase.system-out:
• Playwright pages after init: 1 ▶ Authenticated favorites preconditions ▶ Clear browser session ✅ PASS: Session cleared ✅ PASS: Ready ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/register • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/register • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/register testcase.name: authenticated_favorite_survives_relogin_and_keeps_the_selected_product
testcase.system-out:
• Playwright pages after init: 1 ▶ Authenticated favorites preconditions ▶ Clear browser session ✅ PASS: Session cleared ✅ PASS: Ready ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/register • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/register • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/register ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Type into element: First name • locator=input[data-test='first-name'] • value=John ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Last name • locator=input[data-test='last-name'] • value=Doe ✅ • value=10001 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: House number • locator=input[data-test='house_number'] • value=5 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Street • locator=input[data-test='street'] • locator=[data-test='add-to-favorites'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Clear browser session ✅ PASS: Session cleared ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/login •
